title: Putin's playbook - Sarah Paine
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Sarah Paine on Putin's strategic approach and decision-making patterns. The content is geopolitical commentary rather than AI-focused material.
writeup: This Dwarkesh Patel episode features historian Sarah Paine analyzing Putin's geopolitical strategy and the patterns behind his decision-making. The conversation centers on geopolitics rather than AI industry developments. The takeaway is a framing of Putin's "playbook" as a recurring set of strategic behaviors examined through Paine's lens.
